productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Blue Wanderer Pro Backpack
description: Blue backpack with white piping and branding in frontTwo, adjustable and padded shoulder strap concealed by a zipped flap at the back, the zipped flap can be folded out and attached at the base using a Velcro closure and padded haul loopPullable trolley handle concealed with a zipped flap on the top of the bag and wheels at the base at the back, also has two support structures at the baseOne main zipped compartment with a laptop compartment and an internal zipped pocketOne zipped compartment in front with an organiser sleeve and removable zipped pouch for accessories, has a earphone tab through which earphones can be pulled out while storing the music device in the compartmentOne small compartment at the base with a cover detail that can be extended over the bag to protect it from rainOne open mesh pocket on one side and a zipped pocket on the other side, one zipped pocket in frontWarranty: 3 years guarantee on luggage and garment bags and 2 year guaranty on bags
